title: スプリンターズSの後に・オー！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After suffering a staggering defeat before Nishino
Flower's sheer speed, Sakura Bakushin O is left in
a stupor from the unforeseen turn of events.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fearful that Nishino Flower will eventually come
to usurp her title as class representative, she is
determined to win at the Takamatsunomiya
Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sakura Bakushin O makes a formal challenge to
Nishino Flower, asking her to scrub her neck and
wait. I suppose she wants her rival's neck to be
clean when she comes for it...
